category_sources: source_facts.description says sqtop displays information about active connections for a Squid proxy; official GitHub README describes displaying currently active client connections for a Squid proxy.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading and repository name use sqtop; source_facts.name is sqtop.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains install, configuration, command argument, usage, and examples; README links the project page at paleg.github.io/sqtop.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/paleg/sqtop; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Squid proxy connection display; official GitHub README documents Squid proxy host/port options and interactive connection display.
